title: cyperus rhizomafragilis
intro: Cyperus rhizomafragilis, also known as fragrant nutgrass, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family Cyperaceae. The rhizome of Cyperus rhizomafragilis is used in traditional medicine, which is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus rhizomafragilis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurveda to treat various ailments.
